role: Ayatollah; member of the Assembly of Experts; brother of Kamal Kharrazi
bio: Mohsen Kharrazi is an Iranian Ayatollah and member of the [Assembly of Experts](/orgs/assembly-of-experts). He is a member of the [Society of Seminary Teachers of Qom](/orgs/society-of-seminary-teachers-of-qom). His daughter married Masoud Khamenei, son of Supreme Leader [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei), creating a significant family connection between the Kharrazi and Khamenei families. He is the brother of [Kamal Kharrazi](/people/kamal-kharrazi), who served as Iran's Foreign Minister from 1997 to 2005.

sources.title: Who's Who in Iran's Network of Powerful Families?

editorial_notes: Born 1937 Tehran. Ayatollah. Assembly of Experts member. Brother of Kamal Kharrazi. Daughter married Masoud Khamenei (son of Ali Khamenei).
